channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus with free-falling team last in NFC North
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss to Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears sack head coach Matt Eberflus after Thanksgiving Day loss in first-ever midseason firing
item.description: Chicago Bears head coach Matt Eberflus becomes the first head coach in franchise history to get fired midseason after the team's disastrous loss on Thanksgiving Day, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Missing ingredient: Horns and Aggies renew storied and bitter rivalry after more than a decade
item.description: Ricky Williams won the Heisman Trophy and set the NCAA’s all-time rushing record during an illustrious career with the Texas Longhorns.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken And Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Desrosiers scores 3 TDs as Memphis tops No. 18 Tulane 34-24 to end the Green Wave's faint CFP hopes
item.description: Greg Desrosiers Jr. caught two scoring passes and ran for a touchdown, and Memphis defeated No. 18 Tulane 34-24 to knock the Green Wave out of contention for a berth in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lions extend win streak to 10 games, hold off Bears for 23-20 victory
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions have been dominant for much of the season, leading the league in point differential after routinely routing opponents. Against Chicago, the Lions were good enough to extend their winning streak to 10 games. Barely.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missouri star basketball player stretchered off court in scary moment
item.description: Caleb Grill, the Missouri Tigers' leading scorer so far this season, was stretchered off the court on Wednesday night after an awkward head/neck injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boise State withdraws from Mountain West volleyball tournament rather than play San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Boise State, which twice boycotted regular-season matches with San Jose State, pulled out of the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament Wednesday night even after securing a spot in the semifinals against the Spartans.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rams' Demarcus Robinson will play vs. Saints less than 1 week after DUI arrest
item.description: Demarcus Robinson is expected to play against the Saints Sunday, less than a week after being arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence at over 100 mph.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: LIV Golf will hire sports and entertainment leader Scott O'Neil to replace Greg Norman, report says
item.description: LIV Golf is hiring Scott O’Neil, former CEO of the Philadelphia 76ers and New Jersey Devils, to replace Greg Norman in running the Saudi-backed rival league about to enter its fourth season, The Athletic reported Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blake Snell agrees to 5-year deal with Dodgers: reports
item.description: (KRON) -- After one year with the San Francisco Giants, star pitcher Blake Snell left for their biggest rival. Snell agreed to a five-year deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Wednesday, according to reports from ESPN, MLB.com and others. Snell is a two-time Cy Young award winner.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Family mourns death of 27-year-old woman in Harvey train crash
item.description: A 27-year-old woman was killed in a car versus train crash in Harvey, IL, leaving behind a family grieving for her loss.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Medina, WGN 9

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: James Harden was about booed out of the arena each time he touched the ball, a sound of contempt not heard in Philly since — well, since Ben Simmons was razzed with much the same vocal voraciousness two nights earlier.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes fined over $14K for 'violent gesture' at Bills game
item.description: The fine comes after the star quarterback celebrated a touchdown pass with a hand gesture that appeared to imitate him holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
